faqs.answer: Cockroach extermination in North Merrick typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in North Merrick homes?
faqs.answer: North Merrick properties most commonly experience German cockroach infestations in kitchens and bathrooms, as well as American cockroaches that enter from basements, crawl spaces, and sewer systems. We also treat Oriental cockroaches and occasional brown-banded roach problems in Long Island homes.
